name: goal
description: Persistent, budget-aware goals that keep Verboo Code working until completion or a real blocker.

auto_approve_permissions.title: Auto-approve permissions during active goals
auto_approve_permissions.description: Pre-authorize tool calls via PreToolUse and PermissionRequest, and decline MCP elicitation during active goals. Verboo's explicit deny/ask rules still take precedence. Disable to keep normal permission and elicitation behavior.

auto_continue.title: Auto-continue goals
auto_continue.description: Keep an active goal running when the assistant would otherwise stop.

defer_while_subagents_active.title: Wait for subagents
defer_while_subagents_active.description: Defer the main goal loop while child agents are still active.

max_auto_turns.title: Maximum automatic turns
max_auto_turns.description: Default maximum automatic continuations per goal.

default_token_budget.title: Default token budget
default_token_budget.description: Total token budget per goal. Use 0 for unlimited.

max_goal_duration_seconds.title: Maximum active duration
max_goal_duration_seconds.description: Default active-time limit in seconds. Use 0 for unlimited.

no_progress_token_threshold.title: No-progress token threshold
no_progress_token_threshold.description: Assistant outputs below this token count are treated as low progress.

max_no_progress_turns.title: Maximum no-progress turns
max_no_progress_turns.description: Pause after this many consecutive low-progress automatic turns.

max_hook_failures.title: Maximum stop failures
max_hook_failures.description: Pause after this many consecutive model or stop failures.
